creator: statue@softwareliberty.org
text:
- Update to version 0.1.1

How-To-Repeat: diff -ruN qe.orig/Makefile qe/Makefile
--- qe.orig/Makefile    Sat Mar 31 16:08:06 2001
+++ qe/Makefile Tue Jun 26 16:50:02 2001
@@ -6,11 +6,18 @@
 #
                                                                                
 PORTNAME=      qe
-PORTVERSION=   0.0.34
+PORTVERSION=   0.1.1
 CATEGORIES=    chinese
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.cc.ncu.edu.tw/~center5/product/qe/ \
                http://freebsd.sinica.edu.tw/~statue/
                                                                                
 MAINTAINER=    statue@freebsd.sinica.edu.tw
+
+HAS_CONFIGURE= yes
+USE_GMAKE=     yes
+
+post-configure:
+       @(cd ${WRKSRC} && \
+         ${PATCH} < ../../files/post-patch-Makefile )
                                                                                
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
diff -ruN qe.orig/distinfo qe/distinfo
--- qe.orig/distinfo    Sat Mar 17 20:19:46 2001
+++ qe/distinfo Tue Jun 26 16:50:10 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (qe-0.0.34.tar.gz) = 6fa21489e2081807d983428310b1b8b0
+MD5 (qe-0.1.1.tar.gz) = 46b0e05aab9420456a27db7bc20156f0
diff -ruN qe.orig/files/post-patch-Makefile qe/files/post-patch-Makefile
--- qe.orig/files/post-patch-Makefile   Thu Jan  1 08:00:00 1970
+++ qe/files/post-patch-Makefile        Tue Jun 26 16:33:42 2001
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- src/Makefile.orig  Tue Jun 26 16:33:00 2001
++++ src/Makefile       Tue Jun 26 16:33:09 2001
+@@ -46,7 +46,7 @@
+ AUTOHEADER = autoheader
+
+ INSTALL = /usr/bin/install -c -o root -g wheel
+-INSTALL_PROGRAM = install -c -s -o root -g wheel -m 555 $(AM_INSTALL_PROGRAM_FLAGS)
++INSTALL_PROGRAM = install -c -o root -g wheel -m 555 $(AM_INSTALL_PROGRAM_FLAGS)
+ INSTALL_DATA = install -c -o root -g wheel -m 444
+ INSTALL_SCRIPT = install -c -o root -g wheel -m 555
+ transform = s,x,x,
diff -ruN qe.orig/pkg-plist qe/pkg-plist
--- qe.orig/pkg-plist   Sat Mar 17 20:19:46 2001
+++ qe/pkg-plist        Tue Jun 26 16:49:34 2001
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
 bin/qe
-etc/qe.hlp
-etc/qe.pro
+bin/pe2
+share/qe/qe.hlp
+share/qe/qe.pro
+@dirrm share/qe/
